title: taraxacum poliophytum
intro: Taraxacum poliophytum, also known as the common dandelion, is a perennial plant with a yellow flower and a rosette of jagged, toothed leaves. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, reduce inflammation, and support liver and kidney function. Taraxacum poliophytum has been linked to various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum poliophytum include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
